Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    |   StringLiteral
    11	    |   LeftParen expression RightParen
    12	    ;
    13	
    14	postfixExpression
    15	    :   primaryExpression
    16	        (   LeftBracket expression RightBracket
    17	        |   LeftParen argumentExpressionList? RightParen
    18	        |   Dot Identifier
    19	        |   Arrow Identifier
    20	        |   PlusPlus
    21	        |   MinusMinus
    22	        )*
    23	    ;
    24	
    25	argumentExpressionList
    26	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    27	    ;
    28	
    29	unaryExpression
    30	    :   postfixExpression
    31	    |   PlusPlus unaryExpression
    32	    |   MinusMinus unaryExpression
    33	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    34	    |   Sizeof unaryExpression
    35	    |   Sizeof LeftParen typeName RightParen
    36	    ;
    37	
    38	unaryOperator
    39	    :   Plus | Minus | Star | And | Tilde | Not
    40	    ;
    41	
    42	castExpression
    43	    :   unaryExpression
    44	    ;
    45	
    46	multiplicativeExpression
    47	    :   castExpression ((Star|Slash|Percent) castExpression)*
    48	    ;
    49	
    50	additiveExpression
    51	    :   multiplicativeExpression ((Plus|Minus) multiplicativeExpression)*
    52	    ;
    53	
    54	shiftExpression
    55	    :   additiveExpression ((LeftShift|RightShift) additiveExpression)*
    56	    ;
    57	
    58	relationalExpression
    59	    :   shiftExpression ((Less|Greater|LessEqual|GreaterEqual) shiftExpression)*
    60	    ;
    61	
    62	equalityExpression
    63	    :   relationalExpression ((EqualEqual|NotEqual) relationalExpression)*
    64	    ;
    65	
    66	andExpression
    67	    :   equalityExpression (And equalityExpression)*
    68	    ;
    69	
    70	exclusiveOrExpression
    71	    :   andExpression (Xor andExpression)*
    72	    ;
    73	
    74	inclusiveOrExpression
    75	    :   exclusiveOrExpression (Or exclusiveOrExpression)*
    76	    ;
    77	
    78	logicalAndExpression
    79	    :   inclusiveOrExpression (AndAnd inclusiveOrExpression)*
    80	    ;
    81	
    82	logicalOrExpression
    83	    :   logicalAndExpression (OrOr logicalAndExpression)*
    84	    ;
    85	
    86	conditionalExpression
    87	    :   logicalOrExpression (Question expression Colon conditionalExpression)?
    88	    ;
    89	
    90	assignmentExpression
    91	    :   conditionalExpression
    92	    |   unaryExpression assignmentOperator assignmentExpression
    93	    ;
    94	
    95	assignmentOperator
    96	    :   Equal | StarEqual | SlashEqual | PercentEqual | PlusEqual | MinusEqual
    97	    |   LeftShiftEqual | RightShiftEqual | AndEqual | XorEqual | OrEqual
    98	    ;
    99	
   100	expression
   101	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
   102	    ;
   103	
   104	constantExpression
   105	    :   conditionalExpression
   106	    ;
   107	
   108	declaration
   109	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
   110	    ;
   111	
   112	declarationSpecifiers
   113	    :   declarationSpecifier+
   114	    ;
   115	
   116	declarationSpecifier
   117	    :   typeSpecifier
   118	    |   typeQualifier
   119	    ;
   120	
   121	initDeclaratorList
   122	    :   initDeclarator (Comma initDeclarator)*

   124	
   125	initDeclarator

   127	    ;
   128	
   129	typeSpecifier

   131	    ;

   133	typeQualifier

   135	    ;
   136	
   137	declarator

   143	    |   LeftParen declarator RightParen
   144	    |   directDeclarator LeftBracket assignmentExpression? RightBracket

   146	    |   directDeclarator LeftParen identifierList? RightParen
   147	    ;
   148	
   149	pointer
   150	    :   Star typeQualifierList?
   151	    ;
   152	
   153	typeQualifierList
   154	    :   typeQualifier+
   155	    ;
   156	
   157	parameterTypeList
   158	    :   parameterList (Comma Comma Comma)?

   160

   164

   169

   182

   185	    ;
   186	
   187	statement
   188	    :   labeledStatement
   189	    |   compoundStatement
   190	    |   expressionStatement
   191	    |   selectionStatement
   192	    |   iterationStatement
   193	    |   jumpStatement
   194	    ;
   195	
   196	labeledStatement
   197	    :   Identifier Colon statement
   198	    |   Case constantExpression Colon statement
   199	    |   Default Colon statement
   200	    ;
   201	
   202	compoundStatement
   203	    :   LeftBrace blockItemList? RightBrace
   204	    ;
   205	
   206	blockItemList
   207	    :   blockItem+
   208	    ;
   209	
   210	blockItem
   211	    :   statement
   212	    |   declaration
   213	    ;
   214	
   215	expressionStatement
   216	    :   expression? Semi
   217	    ;
   218	
   219	selectionStatement
   220	    :   If LeftParen expression RightParen statement (Else statement)?
   221	    ;
   222	
   223	iterationStatement
   224	    :   While LeftParen expression RightParen statement
   225	    |   Do statement While LeftParen expression RightParen Semi
   226	    |   For LeftParen expression? Semi expression? Semi expression? RightParen statement
   227	    ;
   228	
   229	jumpStatement
   230	    :   (Return expression?) Semi
   231	    |   Break Semi
   232	    |   Continue Semi
   233	    |   Goto Identifier Semi
   234	    ;
   235	
   236	compilationUnit
   237	    :   translationUnit? EOF
   238	    ;
   239	
   240	translationUnit
   241	    :   externalDeclaration+
   242	    ;
   243	
   244	externalDeclaration
   245	    :   functionDefinition
   246	    |   declaration
   247	    ;
   248	
   249	functionDefinition
   250	    :   declarationSpecifiers declarator declarationList? compoundStatement

   253	declarationList
